pages.latin_text: Link trāns mare obscūrum nāvigāvit.
pages.english_text: Link sailed across the dark sea.
pages.image_prompt: Wide shot of the pirate ship on a moonlit ocean, the Forsaken Fortress a dark silhouette on the horizon. Link stands at the prow, small against the big sky. Cel-shaded Wind Waker style, dramatic moonlight on water.

pages.latin_text: "Moblīnī thēsaurum rapuērunt," inquit Tetra. "Refer!"
pages.english_text: "The Moblins stole the treasure," said Tetra. "Get it back."
pages.image_prompt: Close-up of Tetra talking to Link on the ship deck. She points toward the fortress. Link nods, fists clenched, looking determined. The dark fortress glows behind them.

pages.latin_text: Link sē in doliō cēlāvit. Dolium per āera volāvit!
pages.english_text: Link hid inside a barrel. The barrel flew through the air!
pages.image_prompt: Link curled up inside a barrel, big eyes peeking out, as the barrel arcs through the night sky toward the fortress. Stars and moon behind him. Classic Wind Waker moment — funny and dramatic.

pages.latin_text: Dolium in arcem cecidit. Link tacitē prōspexit.
pages.english_text: The barrel landed in the fortress. Link peeked out quietly.
pages.image_prompt: The barrel has crash-landed among other barrels in the fortress courtyard. Link's wide eyes peer out from inside. Moblins patrol nearby with lanterns and spears. Stone walls, flickering torchlight.

pages.latin_text: Lūx magna per terram sē mōvit. Link sē cēlāvit!
pages.english_text: A big light moved across the ground. Link hid!
pages.image_prompt: Dramatic shot of a bright searchlight beam sweeping right over the barrel Link is in. He ducks down, just his eyes visible. The beam passes. A Moblin stands nearby, looking the other direction.

pages.latin_text: Link tacitē cucurrit. Ā doliō ad dolium rēpsit.
pages.english_text: Link ran quietly. From barrel to barrel he crept.
pages.image_prompt: Side view showing Link darting between barrels in a crouched run, shadows and torchlight creating dramatic contrast. A Moblin patrol is visible in the background, facing away.

pages.latin_text: Moblīnus sē vertit! Link nōn sē mōvit.
pages.english_text: A Moblin turned around! Link did not move.
pages.image_prompt: A big Moblin has turned to look directly toward Link's position. Link is pressed flat against a barrel, eyes wide, holding his breath. The Moblin squints suspiciously.

pages.latin_text: Moblīnus eum vīdit! "ECCE!" clāmāvit.
pages.english_text: The Moblin saw him! "THERE!" it shouted.
pages.image_prompt: The Moblin's eyes go wide, mouth open in a shout. It points directly at Link with one hand, raising its spear with the other. Link's face shifts from frozen to panicked. Other Moblins turn to look.

pages.latin_text: Moblīnī ex omnī ōstiō cucurrērunt. Link cēpērunt!
pages.english_text: Moblins ran from every door. They grabbed Link!
pages.image_prompt: Moblins swarm from all directions — through doors, around corners. Two big Moblins have Link by the arms, lifting him off the ground. His legs kick. His sword clatters away. Chaos, lanterns swinging.

pages.latin_text: Moblīnī Link ex arce iēcērunt. Iterum per āera volāvit.
pages.english_text: They threw Link out of the fortress. He flew through the air again.
pages.image_prompt: Link tumbling through the air, thrown off the fortress wall. No barrel this time — just Link, arms flailing, cap flying off his head. The fortress looms above. The dark ocean below. Not triumphant. Humiliating.

pages.latin_text: Tetra Link ē marī trāxit. Nihil habēbat.
pages.english_text: Tetra pulled Link from the sea. He had nothing.
pages.image_prompt: Tetra reaching over the ship railing to haul a soaking wet, miserable Link aboard. He's dripping, head down, hands empty. No treasure. His cap is gone. He looks small and defeated.

pages.latin_text: Link sōlus sēdit. Arx obscūra et procul erat.
pages.english_text: Link sat alone. The fortress was dark and far away.
pages.image_prompt: Link sitting on the ship deck with his knees pulled up, arms wrapped around them. He stares at the dark fortress on the horizon. Moonlight on the water. He's alone in the frame — small, wet, scared. His cap is missing, making him look even more vulnerable.

pages.latin_text: Moblīnōs meminit. Redīre nōlēbat.
pages.english_text: He remembered the Moblins. He did not want to go back.
pages.image_prompt: Close-up of Link's face, eyes wide with fear. Above him, a thought-cloud shows the Moblins grabbing him — big pig faces, spears, angry eyes. Link's hands grip his own arms. He's shaking slightly.

pages.latin_text: Tetra iuxtā eum sēdit. "Iterum temptā," inquit lēniter.
pages.english_text: Tetra sat next to him. "You can try again," she said quietly.
pages.image_prompt: Tetra sits down beside Link on the deck. She's not looking at him directly — she looks out at the sea. Her voice is gentle, not commanding. Link glances at her. Moonlight on both of them. Two kids on a big ocean.

pages.latin_text: Link arcem spectāvit. Adhūc timēbat. Sed surrēxit.
pages.english_text: Link looked at the fortress. He was still afraid. But he stood up.
pages.image_prompt: Link rising to his feet on the ship deck, facing the fortress. His fists are clenched at his sides but his knees are shaking. His face shows fear AND determination together — not one replacing the other. Tetra watches from behind him. The fortress looms dark ahead.

pages.latin_text: Iterum sē in doliō cēlāvit. Iterum per āera volāvit!
pages.english_text: Link hid in a barrel again. Again he flew through the air!
pages.image_prompt: Same barrel-launch as page 3, but Link's expression is different — not excited, but grimly determined, jaw set. The fortress ahead. Same journey, different Link. His cap is back on.

pages.latin_text: Iterum in arcem cecidit. Hāc vice diūtius exspectāvit.
pages.english_text: Again he landed in the fortress. This time he waited longer.
pages.image_prompt: Link inside the barrel in the courtyard — same as page 4. But this time he waits patiently, watching a Moblin patrol pass by completely before moving. His eyes track them carefully. He's learning.

pages.latin_text: Iterum lūx magna vēnit. Link dolium super sē posuit!
pages.english_text: Again the big light came. Link put a barrel over himself!
pages.image_prompt: Link lifting a barrel over his head to wear it like a shell, his little legs sticking out the bottom. The searchlight beam sweeps toward him. Funny, classic Wind Waker stealth moment — but now it's a trick he learned from last time.

pages.latin_text: Praeter Moblīnōs ambulāvit! Sōlum dolium vīdērunt.
pages.english_text: He walked right past the Moblins! They saw only a barrel.
pages.image_prompt: Link-in-a-barrel walking casually past two confused Moblins. One Moblin leans forward, squinting at the barrel that has legs. The other scratches its head. Comedic beat — Link's eyes gleam through a crack in the barrel.

pages.latin_text: Link thēsaurum invēnit. Iterum arcam aperuit. Tacitē, hāc vice.
pages.english_text: Link found the treasure. Again he opened the chest. Quietly this time.
pages.image_prompt: Link carefully, slowly opening the treasure chest, both hands easing the lid up. He winces, bracing for noise. Golden light seeps out but he controls it. His whole body is tense with care. He learned from last time.

pages.latin_text: Link tacitē ex arce rēpsit. Thēsaurum arte tenēbat.
pages.english_text: Link crept out of the fortress. He held the treasure tight.
pages.image_prompt: Link sneaking along the fortress wall toward an opening, treasure clutched to his chest with both arms. Moblins visible in the distance, oblivious. He moves carefully, staying in shadow. Moonlight ahead shows the way out.

pages.latin_text: In mare dēsiluit. Hāc vice rīdēbat.
pages.english_text: He jumped into the sea. This time he was smiling.
pages.image_prompt: Link leaping off the fortress wall into the ocean below — but unlike page 10, this is his CHOICE. He jumps freely, treasure in one arm, the other arm spread wide. He grins. The moon behind him. A mirror of page 10 but triumphant instead of humiliating.

pages.latin_text: Tetra eum iterum trāxit. "Fēcistī!" inquit.
pages.english_text: Tetra pulled him up again. "You did it!" she said.
pages.image_prompt: Tetra hauling Link aboard the ship — mirror of page 11, but now Link is grinning, holding the golden treasure up with one hand while dripping wet. Tetra is smiling too. The crew cheers behind them.

pages.latin_text: Link timēbat. Sed iterum temptāvit. Fortis erat.
pages.english_text: Link was afraid. But he tried again. He was brave.
pages.image_prompt: Wide final shot of the pirate ship sailing away from the fortress under a huge moon and starry sky. Link sits on the prow, small and happy, treasure glowing beside him. Peaceful, triumphant. The fortress shrinks behind them. The word 'brave' is EARNED — he earned it by failing and choosing to go back.
